Usage: heyfood register [OPTIONS]

 Create or connect a hello.food account, then offer onboarding.

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --api-url           TEXT                       Override the active context API URL.                                  │
│ --auth-url          TEXT                       Override the active context auth URL.                                 │
│ --api-key           TEXT                       API key for local first-party session refresh.                        │
│ --local                                        Use the local Docker dev URLs.                                        │
│ --device                                       Use a short code for SSH/headless systems.                            │
│ --no-browser                                   Print the registration URL instead of opening a browser.              │
│ --timeout           INTEGER RANGE [1<=x<=900]  Seconds to wait for browser authorization. [default: 180]             │
│ --no-onboard                                   Do not offer dietary profile onboarding after registration.           │
│ --json                                         Print one stable JSON result; never open a browser or prompt.         │
│ --help                                         Show this message and exit.                                           │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
